Footer.mission: We put quality back at the center of the news: visible sources, declared context, respect for your time and your intelligence.

Login.title: Sign in
Login.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a sign-in code.
Login.privacyNote: By signing in you agree to our data processing as described in our policy.

errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.requestFailed: We couldn't send the code. Please try again.
errors.invalidCode: Wrong or expired code. Check it and try again.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.

Feed.heading: Your feed
Feed.subheading: An ordered selection of what matters, with the source always visible. Tap a headline to read on the publisher.

why.intro: This item is ranked using several signals. Here's how much each one weighs.

topicMatch.label: Topic match
topicMatch.help: How well the topic fits your interests.

sourceDiversity.label: Source diversity
sourceDiversity.help: Favors a range of sources, avoiding concentration.

topicVariety.label: Topic variety
topicVariety.help: Keeps the feed varied, not a single subject.

clusterProminence.label: Story prominence
clusterProminence.help: How much the story stands out across sources.

list.errorDescription: Something went wrong. Please try again shortly.
list.emptyDescription: There's nothing to show right now. Check back later.
list.caughtUpDescription: You've seen everything we've selected for now. Check back later for more.

Article.linkFirstNote: Ager always links to the original source. We don't host the article text.

Sources.heading: Sources
Sources.subheading: The publishers and outlets Ager gathers news from, with type and publisher group.
Sources.emptyDescription: There are no sources to show right now. Check back later.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: The content you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.

Styleguide.title: Ager design system
Styleguide.intro: Ager's visual identity applied to the interface components. A coherent, sober, editorial baseline to review before wiring real data.

palette.note: Official brand colors. No high saturation, no colored shadows. Recommended distribution: ~60% neutrals, ~25% blue, ≤10% green, ~5% functional.
palette.agerBlue: Header, headings, primary CTAs. Never long body text.

type.note: Merriweather for headings and the wordmark, Inter for UI and body. Layered hierarchy: synthesis → context → depth.
type.sampleBody: Body copy uses Inter at 16px with generous line height, built for short but dense explanations. Simplification serves understanding, not dumbing-down: we define key terms and separate facts from interpretation.
type.caption: Caption

logo.note: Clear space equal to 14% of the symbol. Minimum digital sizes: full logo 120px, icon 32px.
logo.forbidden: Forbidden: shadows or effects, colors outside the palette, rotation, deformation, a wordmark in any font other than Merriweather.

buttons.note: Primary in blue, secondary in ethical green. Secondary CTAs remain an accent.

badges.note: Low-saturation labels. Green signals trust and context, orange evolution, red error.

surfaces.note: Cards, loading skeletons, and empty or error states, in a measured tone.
surfaces.cardDescription: A short supporting description in muted gray.
surfaces.emptyDescription: There's nothing to show here yet. Check back later.
surfaces.errorDescription: We couldn't load the content. Please try again shortly.

feed.note: The reusable feed component: only title, excerpt, source, image and topics. Link-first — no article body. The third card shows the image placeholder. Sample data.
